name: Café Jazz Sessions - March 2026
description: Café Jazz Sessionsis back at the Bhavan.Thefirstsession in2026takes place on March 27 with Bangalore's jazz musicians and bands taking the stage. They will interact with the audience through the magic of music.Started in 2022 by one of the pioneers of jazz in the city,Jagadeesh M R, Director ofThe Bangalore School of Musicand founder ofMoonArra World Fusion Ensemble, this is a monthly event, designed to building a community of jazz musicians in the city and foster a culture of creativity. It is a platform to connect with each other and audiences through jam sessions, lecture demonstrations and performances. The project has fostered a faithful community of musicians who participate and interact freely with younger jazz aspirants while audiences get a rare opportunity to watch, listen and understand the creative processes in jazz.Free entry for audiences.Musicians to register via Whatsapp +91 9844245577 for a spot.
